ValidationRule.description: Requires all task checklists to be completed before moving to QA
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Ready for QA"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "In QA"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "QA Approved") ), ISCHANGED(Status__c), Story_Progress__c < 100 )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Story cannot move to QA until all tasks are 100% complete. Current progress: {!Story_Progress__c}%
